codeReview.summary: The fix directly resolves the prior follow-up scrutiny blocker on relay validation scope. `createProfile` now narrows the DEV insecure-relay allowlist to the literal `ws://127.0.0.1:*` case only, and the focused regression test proves `ws://localhost:*` still surfaces the canonical `Relay URL must start with wss://` error even with the DEV opt-in enabled.

summary: Pass. The original scrutiny finding on over-broad DEV relay allowlisting is closed by commit e063c0a and current HEAD verification remains green.
